description: Vulkoor's Bite, Dark Restoration Lore +23%, Power of Dark Restoration +157, Competence Healing Amp +59, Profane Negative Amp +59, Taint of Evil (ML 30, BtC)

name: Essence of the Cloak of Strahd
description: Invisibility Guard: grants temporary invisibility when hit, lasts 10 seconds without removal on attack/damage. Source: Old Baba's Hut (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Nullscale Armor
description: Nullmagic Guard: small chance to silence foes and dampen magical protections for 10 seconds when hit by spells. Source: Killing Time (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Cracked Core
description: Alchemical Conservation: +1 ki per successful attack, +1 Action Boosts/Turn Undead/Bard Songs per rest. Source: Project Nemesis (ML 30)

name: Essence of Dark Diversion
description: Occultation: 20% enhancement bonus to decreased threat from all damage. Source: Temple of the Deathwyrm (ML 30)

name: Essence of The Masque
description: Soundproof: protects against stunning, dazing, and disorientation from sound-based spells. Source: The Curse of Strahd (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Champion of the Twins
description: Healers Bounty: small chance to cast Heal spell when taking damage. Source: Legendary Vision of Destruction (ML 30)

name: Essence of Constellation, Broken and Reforged
description: Improved Destruction: stacking armor destruction (max 15 stacks), -1 AC and -1% fortification per stack. Source: Too Hot to Handle (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Spear of the Mournlands
description: Touch of the Mournlands: reduces healing/repair amplification, occasionally quells enemies on vorpal strikes. Source: Legendary Lord of Blades (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Epic Litany of the Dead
description: Litany of the Dead II - Ability Bonus: +2 profane bonus to all abilities. Source: Mark of Death (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Cobalt Guard
description: Improved Quelling Strikes: vorpal melee renders targets unable to cast divine spells for 6 seconds, 50% chance to prevent all spellcasting for 3 seconds (12s cooldown). Source: Riding the Storm Out (ML 30)

name: Essence of Ultimatum
description: Petrification Immunity: grants complete petrification immunity. Source: Defiler of the Just (ML 30)

name: Essence of the Dethek Runestone
description: Runic Revitalization: 10% chance on positive energy spell cast to gain 100 temp HP and 50 temp SP for 60 seconds (120s cooldown). Source: Fire on Thunder Peak (ML 30)

name: Essence of Pomura's Memento
description: Insightful Spell Lore V: all spells gain 5% insightful bonus to critical hit chance. Source: Hunt or Be Hunted (ML 30)
